Spacecraft Components Corp. Your Connector Consultant - Home Test

PhoeniXperimental – PhoeniXperimental LLC is an Air and Space, Research and Development, Incubation and Innovation Company, dedicated to creating breakthrough concepts for disruptive innovation. Our focus areas include propulsion, communication, electrical/electronic, thermal, mechanical, and life sciences technologies. We leverage internal and external ideas to advance projects from TRL1 to TRL5. Recognizing the pressing need to advance space-directed applications, PhoeniXperimental aims to help normalize space exploration and utilization. Our product development follows a specific order of priorities: 1.) Durability, Longevity, and Robustness. 2.) Integrity. 3.) Efficiency. 4.) Compatibility/Ergonomics. Given the scope of space exploration parallels long-duration maritime, submarine, and polar expeditions, our approach emphasizes reusability and the capability to manufacture during travel.
